4.title: Requests
4.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries count = avg(dt.service.request.count, filter: { in(dt.entity.service, classicEntitySelector("type(service),servicetype(\"DATABASE_SERVICE\")")) }), by: { dt.entity.service }
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

5.title: Response time - Median

6.title: Response time - Slowest 10%

10.title: Failure rate
10.query:
timeseries { failure_count = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count), count = sum(dt.service.request.count) }, by: { dt.entity.service }, filter: { in(dt.entity.service, classicEntitySelector("type(service),servicetype(\"DATABASE_SERVICE\")")) }
| fieldsAdd rate = failure_count[] / count[]
| sort arrayAvg(rate) desc
| fieldsRemove failure_count, count
| limit 20
